examples: He made a further interrogative noise.
There are three forms of the sentence:affirmative, interrogative and negative.
There are three forms of the sentences affirmative, interrogative, and negative.
Had she ever seen this man as a younger self, been taken in by those strikingly interrogative eyes, received?
There is, too, a troubling knowingness, an uneasiness about how seriously the novel should press down on its seriously interrogative title.
